name: Rindu Kasih
overview: Rindu Kasih is a 2022 Malaysian television drama series directed by Pali Yahya, starring Ummi Nazeera, Amyza Aznan, Izzue Islam, Nafiz Muaz, Ezzaty Abdullah and many more. This series starts its premiere on Samarinda Slot, TV3 starting September 15, 2022 replacing Suri Hati.

trailers.title: Rindu Kasih | Mulai 16 November, Setiap Isnin - Khamis, 10 malam hanya di TV3
